title: Positive flow: User is redirected to provider for login
preconditions: User is logged out of the app
test_steps: Open the app | Wait for the loading screen to appear | Verify the message 'Please wait while we send you to your provider to log in...' is displayed | Wait for the app to redirect the user to the provider's login page
expected_result: User is redirected to the provider's login page

title: Negative flow: User cancels the redirection
preconditions: User is logged out of the app
test_steps: Open the app | Wait for the loading screen to appear | Click on the 'Cancel' button | Verify the message 'Please wait while we send you to your provider to log in...' is still displayed | Wait for the app to redirect the user to the provider's login page
expected_result: User is not redirected to the provider's login page

title: Negative flow: User cancels the redirection multiple times
preconditions: User is logged out of the app
test_steps: Open the app | Wait for the loading screen to appear | Click on the 'Cancel' button | Verify the message 'Please wait while we send you to your provider to log in...' is still displayed | Click on the 'Cancel' button again | Verify the message 'Please wait while we send you to your provider to log in...' is still displayed | Wait for the app to redirect the user to the provider's login page
expected_result: User is not redirected to the provider's login page

title: Negative flow: No internet connection
preconditions: User is logged out of the app and there is no internet connection
test_steps: Open the app | Wait for the loading screen to appear | Verify the message 'Please wait while we send you to your provider to log in...' is displayed | Wait for the app to redirect the user to the provider's login page
expected_result: User is not redirected to the provider's login page

title: Negative flow: App crashes during redirection
preconditions: User is logged out of the app
test_steps: Open the app | Wait for the loading screen to appear | Verify the message 'Please wait while we send you to your provider to log in...' is displayed | Wait for the app to redirect the user to the provider's login page
expected_result: App does not crash during redirection

title: Negative flow: App crashes during cancellation
preconditions: User is logged out of the app
test_steps: Open the app | Wait for the loading screen to appear | Click on the 'Cancel' button | Verify the message 'Please wait while we send you to your provider to log in...' is still displayed | Click on the 'Cancel' button again | Verify the message 'Please wait while we send you to your provider to log in...' is still displayed | Wait for the app to redirect the user to the provider's login page
expected_result: App does not crash during cancellation

title: Negative flow: App crashes during message display
preconditions: User is logged out of the app
test_steps: Open the app | Wait for the loading screen to appear | Verify the message 'Please wait while we send you to your provider to log in...' is displayed | Wait for the app to redirect the user to the provider's login page
expected_result: App does not crash during message display
